raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What's on your mind","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately, Priya?","description":"Safe opener that lets her set context before any specific thread is raised.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Post-launch recovery","name":"I've noticed you've been quieter this week since the ship — what's that been about?","description":"Checks whether the quieter week is normal recovery or something else without assuming a problem.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"What's unresolved","name":"Is there anything from the launch that's still sitting open for you?","description":"Surfaces lingering work, decisions, or loose ends after the major feature shipped.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-quarter shape","name":"What do you expect to own next quarter?","description":"Gets her own view of upcoming ownership before any new project is introduced.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"What to protect","name":"What are you trying to keep stable in your plan for next quarter?","description":"Surfaces what she wants to preserve if new work gets added.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring thread","name":"What would mentoring actually look like in your week?","description":"Turns the stalled mentoring interest into a concrete shape and time cost.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring tradeoff","name":"What would need to move off your plate to make mentoring real?","description":"Forces a trade-off between mentoring and current commitments.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Launch leverage","name":"What do you want this launch to change for you over the next few months?","description":"Explores how she wants recognition and impact from the ship to translate into leverage.","purpose":"competency","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team visibility","name":"How did the team's response to the launch land for you?","description":"Surfaces whether recognition and visibility felt meaningful or incomplete.","purpose":"competency","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"Given all that, what's the first concrete thing you want to move by our next check-in?","description":"Closes on a specific near-term commitment without opening a new thread.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
